source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/04_2G & 3G (A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW)/▶ CE MDR/231013 컨설팅 추가 리뷰(CER 외)/아비즈 MDR TCF_231013/A-TCF-5-157 Clinical Evaluation/Appendix I Checklist for the release of the clinical evaluation report (rev.1)_마지막수정.docx

document.title: Checklist for the release of the clinical evaluation report

sourceSummary.oneLine: Checklist for releasing the Clinical Evaluation Report for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used to confirm that the clinical evaluation report addresses clinical data, equivalence, state of the art, GSPR conformity, residual risks, evaluator qualifications, and related attachments before release.
keyPoints: Product name is Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector with model names A1717MCW / A1417MCW / F1417MCW.
The checklist states this is a CE certification process.
The Clinical Evaluation Report considers literature, clinical data, comparison with similar product, market research, and test report.
The report addresses conformity to MDR GSPR 1 and 8 at Clause 4.7 to 4.10.
The Clinical Evaluation Report includes residual-risk conclusions at Clause 6 and evaluator CV/declaration materials as Appendix IV.

concepts.name: Clinical evaluation report release
concepts.evidence: The following aspects should be checked for the release of a clinical evaluation report:

concepts.name: Clinical evaluation report
concepts.evidence: Checklist for the release of the clinical evaluation report

concepts.name: Equivalence demonstration
concepts.evidence: If equivalence is claimed, - is demonstration of equivalence included in the report?

concepts.name: PMS/PMCF data
concepts.evidence: has the latest PMS/ PMCF data been taken into consideration and has it been summarised and referenced in the report?

concepts.name: State of the art
concepts.pageTarget: Clinical Evaluation State of the Art
concepts.evidence: is current knowledge/ the state of the art summarised in the report and is it adequately substantiated by literature?

concepts.name: MDR GSPR conformity
concepts.pageTarget: MDR General Safety and Performance Requirements
concepts.evidence: Is conformity to each of the relevant General Safety and Performance Requirements (MDR GSPR 1, 8) clearly stated

concepts.name: Residual risks and uncertainties
concepts.evidence: Do the report’s conclusions identify all residual risks and uncertainties or unanswered questions that should be addressed with PMS/ PMCF studies?

concepts.name: Evaluator qualifications and declaration of interests
concepts.evidence: Does the manufacturer hold a CV and declaration of interests of each of the evaluators and are these up-to-date?

evidence.claim: The document is a checklist for release of a clinical evaluation report.
evidence.evidenceText: Checklist for the release of the clinical evaluation report

evidence.claim: The product covered is a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Product name: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The covered model names are A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW.
The checklist identifies Han, Jimin from the Quality team as preparer.

evidence.evidenceText: Approved by Hur, Namkyu Quality manager 날짜

evidence.evidenceText: Yes, Literature, Clinical data, Comparison with similar product, market research and test report was considered in the report.

evidence.claim: Clinical data generated and held by the manufacturer are summarized in Clause 1 Summary of Clinical Evaluation Report.
evidence.evidenceText: Yes, it is summarized in Clause 1 Summary of Clinical Evaluation Report

evidence.claim: Comparison with similar product is addressed for equivalence.
evidence.evidenceText: Yes. Comparison with similar product is addressed.

evidence.claim: Latest PMS/PMCF data were not considered because this is a CE certification process.
evidence.evidenceText: No. This is CE certification process.

evidence.claim: The Clinical Evaluation Report was prepared on 22.12.2022 as Rev. 0 and updated as Rev.1 on an unspecified placeholder date.
evidence.evidenceText: This report is prepared on 22.12.2022 (Rev. 0) and updated on 날짜 (Rev.1).

evidence.claim: Model, size, setting, clinical situation, indication, population, user, and duration coverage is described in A-TCF-5-149 Product Description.
evidence.evidenceText: It is described in A-TCF-5-149 Product Description.

evidence.claim: The Clinical Evaluation Report covers the product and reviewed literature, clinical data, comparison with similar product, and market research.
evidence.evidenceText: Clinical Evaluation Report covers the product. Literature, Clinical data, Comparison with similar product and market research were reviewed in the report.

evidence.claim: Conformity to MDR GSPR 1 and 8 is addressed in Clinical Evaluation Report Clause 4.7 to 4.10.
evidence.evidenceText: It is addressed at Clause 4.7 ~ 4.10 of Clinical Evaluation Report
evidence.pageTarget: MDR General Safety and Performance Requirements

evidence.claim: Manufacturer information materials correspondence is addressed in Clause 1 Summary of Clinical Evaluation Report.
evidence.evidenceText: It is addressed at Clause 1 Summary of Clinical Evaluation Report

evidence.claim: A-TCF-5-118 Clinical Evaluation Report includes conclusions on residual risks and uncertainties at Clause 6.
evidence.evidenceText: A-TCF-5-118 Clinical Evaluation Report includes that conclusions at Clause 6

evidence.evidenceText: A-TCF-5-118 Clinical Evaluation Report is issued on 날짜 as Rev. 1.

evidence.evidenceText: Yes. Evaluator is a medical doctor who uses our products and his CV is attached.

evidence.evidenceText: Yes, CV of participants are attached in A-TCF-5-118 Clinical Evaluation Report and Declaration of interests is signed by evaluator. These documents is attached as Appendix IV of A-TCF-5-118 and they are up to date.

reviewFlags.reason: Document date fields contain the Korean placeholder '날짜' rather than actual dates for preparation, review, approval, Rev.1 update, and report issue.
Source metadata authoritySignal is FDA, but source text refers to CE certification process and MDR GSPR; authority/jurisdiction is ambiguous or conflicting.
The source does not identify a manufacturer name.
